title: tengine.shadergen.snap_completed v1
description: Snap cycle (reload+step+screenshot+compare) finished. Producer: registry handle SNAP_COMPLETED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame}'.

ssim.description: Structural similarity index between before/after screenshots (1.0 = identical).

before_path.description: Absolute path to the pre-reload screenshot on disk.

after_path.description: Absolute path to the post-reload screenshot on disk.

frame.description: GPU frame index at which the snap cycle completed.
